creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
(In reply to Dan Langille from comment #3)
Thank you for the confirmation.

As I wrote before, "pkg audit" returns "vulnerable" for FreeBSD-12.2_2 even it it should not be vulnerable.

Your problem is not about kernel / userland mismatch. 405.pkg-base-audit properly checked for your userland version 12.2-p2 (as FreeBSD-12.2_2) but "pkg audit" report is wrong. Problably wrong xuln.xml entry.
